---
title: "pbmc3k report"
format: html
params:
  matrix_dir: "data/filtered_gene_bc_matrices/hg19"
---


```{r libraries}
library(Seurat) # managed by the conda env under envs/single_cell.yaml
```

Create Seurat object with min cells and min features filters.

```{r create-object}
pbmc.data <- Read10X(data.dir = params$matrix_dir)

pbmc <- CreateSeuratObject(counts = pbmc.data, project = "pbmc3k",
                           min.cells = 3, min.features = 200)

print(pbmc)
```
